====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Iris
|pkmn=Haxorus
|main=yes
|stage1=Fraxure
|type1=Dragon
|img=Iris Haxorus Adventures.png
|cap=Iris's Fraxure
|epnum=PS478
|epname=Big City Battles
|desc={{p|Haxorus}} is Iris's first known Pokémon, which she owned since it was a {{p|Fraxure}}. Iris uses it as transportation by riding on its back. At the Tubeline Bridge, it faced Drayden's {{p|Druddigon}} in battle, but was easily defeated. In the Pokémon League, it fought against [[Zinzolin|Gray]]'s {{p|Cryogonal}} and won. In the next round, Fraxure was used against Black's {{p|Braviary}}, [[Brav]], where it evolved into a Haxorus. Eventually, it was defeated by a supereffective {{m|Ice Beam}} from Black's {{p|Carracosta}}, [[Costa]].}}

{{anchor|Druddigon 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Iris
|pkmn=Druddigon
|type1=Dragon
|img=Iris Druddigon Adventures.png
|epnum=PS516
|epname=One Way or Another
|desc={{p|Druddigon}} is Iris's second known Pokémon. Iris used it to battle against Black's {{p|Galvantula}}, [[Tula]], in the Pokémon League but later switched it out with her Haxorus. Later, it was used to battle Team Plasma as they attacked the League.

Druddigon's only known move is {{m|Bulldoze}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Iris
|pkmn=Lapras
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Iris Lapras Adventures.png
|epnum=PS516
|epname=One Way or Another
|desc={{p|Lapras}} is Iris's third known Pokémon. Iris used it to battle Drayden when she was younger at Blackthorn City. It faced Drayden's Druddigon in battle and was defeated by it.

None of Lapras's moves are known.}}
